metadata.description: A comparative working dataset tracking displacement governance across selected Southeast Asian countries. Sources include UNHCR, ILO, World Bank, IDMC, national legislation, and expert judgement. The dataset is intended for research visualisation and will be updated as evidence improves. It is not a primary source.

rows.value: No dedicated refugee law
rows.note: No dedicated refugee law; administrative and cabinet-based arrangements remain central.

rows.value: Disaster and emergency systems exist, but no comprehensive conflict-IDP law.
